{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Sea Drake
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Sea Drake]] is a sacred beast.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
